upstreamSources: USPTO TMSEARCH (tmsearch.uspto.gov) — US trademark registry, all filing statuses
EUIPO Trademark Search API v1.1.0 — EU trademark registry, OAuth2
RDAP (rdap.org) — domain registration, 7 TLDs + up to 20 typosquat candidates
GLEIF API (api.gleif.org) — 2.5M+ global legal entities, G20-endorsed LEI standard
Direct HTTP fetch — live vs parked page detection on brand.com

methods.name: check_brand_clearance
methods.notes: All 6 sources in parallel. Cold: 5-20s. Warm: <10ms.

methods.name: check_domain_conflicts
methods.notes: 7 TLD checks + up to 20 typosquat RDAP lookups. Cold: 8-15s.

validatedTestResults.Luminary: HIGH — 20 USPTO hits (2 LIVE class-042 exact matches), 9 GLEIF entities, 4 registered TLDs, 6 typosquats, live web
validatedTestResults.Tidewake: LOW — 0 trademark hits, 0 company registrations, .com available, .net registered
validatedTestResults.Stripe: 18 typosquats registered including srtipe.com, stirpe.com, strpie.com
validatedTestResults.Café: Finds CAFE trademarks at score=100 — Unicode normalization confirmed working
validatedTestResults.nice_class=25 on Luminary: class=009,025,041 stays EXACT; class=035,043 downgraded to HIGH — re-weighting confirmed
validatedTestResults.nice_class=42 on Luminary: Score stays HIGH — Luminary has LIVE class-042 marks (Luminary Platforms, CLEAN CONNECT AI)

alphaCategories.name: 6-Source Normalization Into One Risk Signal
alphaCategories.description: Trademarkia ($199/search) covers USPTO only. LegalZoom's clearance package ($299-$750) is manual and takes 24-48 hours. Neither checks domains, typosquats, or company registrations. This tool queries 6 sources in parallel and normalizes them into a single conflict_risk_score in 5-20 seconds. Replacing a multi-tab afternoon workflow with one agent call.

alphaCategories.name: Live USPTO and EUIPO Registry Data
alphaCategories.description: Free LLMs cannot access current trademark registries. Trademark status changes daily — new filings, status changes, abandonment. The exact serial numbers, owners, goods classes, and filing dates returned are live registry facts unavailable to any LLM without tool access.

alphaCategories.name: Nice Class Overlap Scoring
alphaCategories.description: A trademark in class 25 (clothing) is lower risk for a SaaS product than one in class 42 (software services). The optional nice_class parameter re-weights all trademark hits: hits in a different class are downgraded one conflict level (EXACT→HIGH, HIGH→MEDIUM). No existing free tool does this.

alphaCategories.name: Registered Typosquat Enumeration
alphaCategories.description: Generates character transpositions, omissions, doublings, homoglyphs, and keyword variants (getbrand.com, brandhq.com etc.) then verifies each via RDAP. Returns only registered variants — those are the actual risk signal. Trademarkia and LegalZoom do not check this. For Stripe: 18 registered typosquats found.

alphaCategories.name: GLEIF Global Company Name Conflicts
alphaCategories.description: GLEIF covers 2.5M+ active legal entities globally (G20-endorsed LEI standard). Free, no auth. Prefix-boost algorithm surfaces compound names: 'Luminary Real Estate LLC' scores 75 rather than being filtered out by pure Levenshtein. Covers US, EU, and global regulated entities. No existing brand clearance tool includes GLEIF.

crossToolOpportunities.partnerTool: Any trademark monitoring tool on CTX marketplace
crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: check_brand_clearance gives the snapshot at naming time. Pairing with a monitoring tool creates ongoing protection — new trademark filings against your brand after launch.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Run a full clearance on Luminary, then set up monitoring for new LUMINARY trademark filings in classes 9 and 42.

upstreamGaps.gap: Trademarkia charges $199 per search report and is manual, PDF-output only. Not agent-callable. No domain or company check.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: MCP-native, structured JSON output, $0.10/query, all 6 sources in one call.

upstreamGaps.gap: No free tool normalizes USPTO + EUIPO + RDAP + GLEIF + Companies House into a single risk signal. Each requires separate registration, separate API format, separate schema.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: Single endpoint, single typed response schema, parallel fetch, Levenshtein + Unicode normalization across all sources.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Run a full brand clearance check on the name Luminary
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires live USPTO registry, live RDAP, live GLEIF, and live HTTP fetch of luminary.com simultaneously.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: A founder using Luminary without clearance faces the exact C&D scenario documented in the Reddit threads cited in the proposal.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLM cannot access any of the 6 sources. Will give generic advice about trademark searching without any actual trademark data.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — HIGH verdict, 20 USPTO hits, 9 GLEIF entities, 4 registered TLDs, 6 typosquats

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Is the name Tidewake clear for a SaaS launch? Check trademarks, domains, and company registrations.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires live trademark search and RDAP domain check for a name that has no training data coverage.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Founders need a definitive answer before committing legal and design spend to a name.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLM will say it cannot check live trademark registries or domain registration.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — LOW verdict, 0 trademark hits, 0 company registrations, .com available

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Search USPTO and EUIPO for trademarks on the name Clearpath in the software services class (class 42)
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires live USPTO + EUIPO data with nice_class re-weighting applied.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: A developer clearing a name for a SaaS product needs to know whether existing trademarks are in their specific goods/services class.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLM cannot search trademark registries.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Which domains are available for the brand NovaSpark, and are any typosquat variants already registered?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires live RDAP lookups for 7 TLDs + up to 20 typosquat candidates.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Registering a domain while typosquats are already active means traffic and brand confusion from day one.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Cannot check live domain registration or generate and verify typosquat variants.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Are there any companies already registered under the name Luminary globally?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires live GLEIF API query across 2.5M+ global entities.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Conflicting company registrations in major jurisdictions create legal complexity for international expansion.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLM cannot query GLEIF or any live company registry.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — 9 GLEIF entities returned across US, EU, and global jurisdictions

candidatePromptPool.prompt: I want to name my podcast platform Luminary. Give me a full brand clearance including whether the .com is live or parked.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires USPTO search (Luminary Media LLC had a podcast-related mark), live web fetch of luminary.com, and RDAP.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Luminary was an actual podcast platform that faced C&D and brand conflicts — this is exactly the use case.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Cannot fetch live trademark data, web metadata, or domain status.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — HIGH verdict, luminary.com live (Australian digital agency), LUMINARY dead mark in class 038,009,041 found

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Check how many typosquat domains are registered for Stripe and who owns them
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires generating permutations and verifying each via live RDAP.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Typosquat exposure is a key risk metric for brand protection attorneys and security teams.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Cannot generate and verify domain permutations against live RDAP.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — 18 registered typosquats for Stripe including srtipe.com (Name.com), stirpe.com (joker.com), strpie.com (Dynadot)

candidatePromptPool.prompt: I'm building a SaaS product in the AI security space. Clear the name Luminary specifically for software/SaaS use (Nice class 42).
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires USPTO class-42 trademark data with per-hit nice_class re-weighting. Free LLM cannot access registries.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Luminary has two LIVE class-42 trademarks (Luminary Platforms and CLEAN CONNECT AI) — a founder entering this space without this check would face certain C&D.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Cannot access USPTO. Cannot apply class-specific re-weighting.

candidatePromptPool.testResult: pass — HIGH verdict with class-042 EXACT LIVE marks correctly identified as primary conflict drivers

level1.notes: All fields consistent: similarity_score=100 for exact name matches, conflict_level=EXACT for score=100. nice_class re-weighting preserves class matches (EXACT) and downgrades others (HIGH). Typosquat domains all verified registered via RDAP before inclusion. GLEIF prefix-boost correctly scores compound names at 75.

level2.upstreamComparison: Luminary results verified: Luminary Legacy LLC (serial 97319616, reg 7047003, class 035,043) confirmed on tmsearch.uspto.gov. luminary.com WHOIS confirmed registered to Australian digital agency. GLEIF results match api.gleif.org direct query.
issues: EUIPO returning 0 results — sandbox credentials (EUIPO_SANDBOX=true) return test data only. Production requires ID verification at docs.apiplatform@euipo.europa.eu. EU trademark coverage pending production approval.

methods.name: check_domain_conflicts
methods.notes: Up to 27 parallel RDAP calls. Cold: 8-15s. Warm: <10ms.

methods.name: search_company_names
methods.notes: GLEIF + Companies House parallel. Cold: 1-3s. Warm: <10ms.

latencyAudit.schemaCompleteness: 4/4 methods have complete outputSchema with typed sub-schemas per field. nice_class re-weighting is post-processing — no separate cache entries per class value.

signoff.overallStatus: PENDING — 6 prompts validated locally on live server. Tests 3 and 4 (Clearpath trademark + NovaSpark domain) pending Railway deployment.
